🚨 Fake News Alert 🚨

Rumors are spreading that Sanju Samson could be banned and miss the semifinal, but there is no official update from the ICC. So far, no action has been taken. 

Even if the incident is reviewed, the maximum possible outcome would likely be a match fee fine, not a ban. The helmet throw did not appear intentional. 

Let’s stop believing and sharing fake news. Stay calm, support the team, and focus on the big semifinal ahead. 🇮🇳
